sglang.title: fix ep_moe_reorder kernel bugs
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

 The original cuda kernel implementation only supported float32, while inference inputs typically use bfloat16 or float16 dtypes, so I fixed it.
 The CUDA kernel currently lacks type-specific vectorization length handling and doesn't account for non-divisible cases.
 The scale computatio

sglang.title: [Refactor] Multimodal data processing for VLM
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR refactors the base multimodal processor to better handle different VLM input formats in a more uniform and robust way. The changes improve the handling of preprocessed vs. raw multimodal inputs and consolidate the logic for combining multimodal data items.
Modifications

Now it on

sglang.title: Decoder-only Scoring API
sglang.author: chanh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Implement the Scoring API proposed here #5973
Original idea comes from this paper: Holistic Evaluation of Language Models which states the following:
We address the re-ranking task in a pointwise fashion: we formulate the information
retrieval problem using prompting as a binary log-proba

sglang.title: feat: add dp-rank to KV events
sglang.author: ishandhanani
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In DP attention - multiple DP ranks will maintain their own KV cache. In order to have efficient routing - we want to ensure that we're able to route to the DP rank that contains the best KV cache match. This PR now annotates KV events with the DP attention rank so it can be used by exter

sglang.title: Support LoRA in TestOpenAIVisionServer and fix fused kv_proj loading bug.
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Previously Phi4 MM CI test did not support vision LoRA, therefore we had to temporarily disable the multi image test.
Modifications

Add support for vision LoRA for Phi4mm open ai server CI. Enabled the previously failing multi image test.
Fix another bug in the fused qkv_proj shape and a

sglang.title: support 1 shot allreduce  in 1-node and 2-node using mscclpp
sglang.author: zyksir
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For now we can only use 1-shot all reduce in 1 node. However, there are times that we need TP16 and 2-node allreduce. Recently mscclpp has some examples about 1 shot all reduce in 2-node, which can improve the latency of 2-node allreduce for small messages.

Modifications

To run benchmark cli, we need to install extra packages like pandas and datasets
This PR adds them as extra dependency, so users can install them through pip install vllm[bench]

Fix vLLM implementation compatibility with transformers 4.52 for Idefics3.
Remove is_available_online=False for models that can now be found on HF Hub, and get the newly-enabled tests to

vllm.title: Add DeepSeek-R1-0528 function call chat template
vllm.author: Xu-Wenqing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
DeepSeek-R1-0528 model support function call, add function call chat template.
Usage:
vllm serve ... --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser deepseek_v3 --chat-template examples/tool_chat_template_deepseekr1.jinja
Function Call Test
Use Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard to evaluate function

vllm.title: Sm100 blockwise fp8 swap ab
vllm.author: IwakuraRein
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add the swap and transpose tensor A/B path to sm100 block-wise fp8 GEMM. This reduces the overhead of extra paddings.
Also add a basic heuristic.
Note: looks like 18778 is duplicate with part of this PR.

vllm.title: Allow AsyncLLMEngine.generate to target a specific DP rank
vllm.author: jmswen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This change allows an AsyncLLMEngine to target a specific DP rank. This is useful in contexts where load balancing to DP ranks happens externally (e.g., via Dynamo).
Test Plan
Added an example. To run the example, run:
python examples/online_serving/multi_instance_data_parallel.py

vllm serv

vllm.title: [Bugfix][EP+DP] Fix internode check
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes the check for is_internode in the A2A communicators.
The function in_the_same_node_as(cpu_group, source_rank=0) returns a list of bools but it was being used as if it returned a single bool. Since the list is is not empty, is_intranode would alway be true.
Also removes the hack

vllm.title: [Perf] Tunings for SM100 FP8 CUTLASS kernel
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I noticed that the FP8 CUTLASS kernel for Blackwell only had one default set of configs. This PR adds new configs for small M < 128.
For Llama 8B on B200, these tunings offer a GEMM improvement of:

1.7 to 2.5x speedup at M<64
1.1 to 1.3x speedup at 64<=M<128

Accuracy eval:
lm_eval --model vllm --m

vllm.author: lsy323
vllm.bodyExcerpt: tests/tpu/test_compilation.py checks the FX graph dump from torch.compile.
